name: Raspberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Dust raspberries with 2 tablespoons flour; set aside.
3. Mix remaining flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl.
4. In another bowl, mix egg and oil; add the flour mixture alternately with milk.
5. Fold in the raspberries.
6. Fill standard-sized greased muffin cups (or paper liners) about 2/3 full.
7. Combine chopped nuts, brown sugar, and remaining cinnamon in a small bowl.
8. Sprinkle over the muffins.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes.
10. Stir together powdered sugar and lemon juice.
11. When muffins are slightly cooled, drizzle the sugar/lemon mixture on top.
